headline: Insider Selling At MarketAxess Raises Questions On Growth Story Confidence
summary: Insider selling at MarketAxess Holdings (NasdaqGS:MKTX) has continued over the past year. No insider purchases have been reported at the company during this same period. The ongoing pattern of sales without buying is drawing fresh attention to insider sentiment. MarketAxess operates an electronic trading platform for corporate bonds and other fixed income products, putting it at the center of how institutional investors trade credit. As electronic bond trading has become more common, the...
